task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has located the appointment for Arthur Dent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule, calendar, or patient list shows an appointment for 'Arthur Dent' (scheduled for 10:00:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the appointment details or edit screen for Arthur Dent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, dialog, or page displaying the details of Arthur Dent's appointment is open, showing editable fields for status and reason.

task_completion.description: Verify the reason for visit has been updated to 'Severe migraine with aura'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the visit reason or chief complaint contains 'Severe migraine with aura' (or at least the keywords 'migraine' and 'aura').

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment status has been changed to 'Arrived'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or status indicator shows the appointment status as 'Arrived' (or 'Checked In') and is no longer in a 'Pending' state.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem via a web browser rather than using backend scripts or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH UI, not a terminal window executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NOSH ChartingSystem application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web browser showing an EHR system, not a mock HTML file or a generic text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the required status and reason into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Severe migraine with aura' and status 'Arrived' are entered into the specific EHR form fields within the web application, not a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient is Arthur Dent, with an appointment at 10:00:00 today. The target appointment status is 'Arrived' (must not be 'Pending', 'No Show', or 'Cancelled'). The reason for visit must include the words 'migraine' and 'aura'.
